case_title: GWENDOLYN GONZALES VS. DAVID GT NEVAREZ SR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,676.00 FILED BY GONZALES, GWENDOLYN AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ SR., DAVID GT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, GWENDOLYN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, GWENDOLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEVAREZ SR., DAVID GT $8,676.00 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,820.00, PLAINTIFF PROVED HER BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT TO REPAY AMOUNT LOANED TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT NOTED (SEE NOTES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF GWENDOLYN GONZALES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DAVID GT NEVAREZ JR. IS PRESENT IN COURT. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. AUTHORIZATION IS GIVEN TO SIGN THE JUDGE PRO TEM STIPULATION ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF ECHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-31-22.
REMARK:EXHIBITS RECD WITH INITIAL CLAIM FROM PLANTIFF
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD 5/26/22 VIA MAIL SUBMITTED & FORWARDED TO DEPT 506
STIPULATION THE USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, GWENDOLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEVAREZ SR., DAVID GT $8,676.00 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,820.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, GWENDOLYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $69) SERVED MAY-03-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ SR., DAVID GT
